title: Amtech S8148 3W COB LED Worklight with Clamp
features: Removable clamp with 3" wide jaw opening & pole clamp feature
Super bright COB LED 250 lumen output
360 degree swivel base with 2 strong magnetic mounts
Instructions for use: 1. Twist to open, 2. Remove the battery isolation strip, 3. Replace cover as per case markings, 4. To remove spring clamp, lift rectangular clip and slide off locating slots.
description: Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products.

specifications_table.Light Source Special Features: Wide beam angle, adjustable positioning with magnetic mounts
